title: pelargonium × princeanum
intro: Pelargonium × princeanum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, commonly used in herbal medicine. The plant's leaves and flowers contain compounds with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and skin care. Rose Geranium is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
